name: Water Flea
description: A small aquatic predator from the deep koi pond and the southeastern flooded zone. It does not hit especially hard, but in numbers it can turn a calm dive into chaos.
respawnInfo: 1 day by default. In the Flooded Zone it takes 2 days.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.tell: It swims erratically and snaps in with a short bite.
attacks.howToAvoid: Dodge or block with an underwater weapon; the timing is simple.

attacks.name: Charged Bite
attacks.tell: It drifts back slightly before surging in faster.
attacks.howToAvoid: Watch its line and sidestep as it commits.
attacks.notes: The same bite pattern with better closing speed.

behavior: It patrols slowly with a bobbing up-and-down swim while watching over deeper water. It also has a far faster upper-yard variant: the Spiny Water Flea.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile on sight and seeks the player the moment they enter its range. Even with modest damage, several at once can punish anyone low on air or swimming room.
interactionWithCreatures: Diving bell spiders hunt and kill them with ease. The fleas try to defend themselves, but they rarely have a real chance.
strategy: Any underwater weapon works. Stabbing and salty help a lot, and the key is not giving them easy approach angles while you manage air and depth.
